// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

namespace TestNs
{
    partial class MyControl
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Defines the <see cref="IsOpen"/> property.
        /// </summary>
        public static readonly global::Avalonia.StyledProperty<bool> IsOpenProperty =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaProperty.Register<global::TestNs.MyControl, bool>(nameof(IsOpen));

        private static readonly global::System.IDisposable _isOpenChangedReg =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaObjectExtensions.AddClassHandler<global::TestNs.MyControl, bool>(
                IsOpenProperty.Changed,
                static (sender, e) => sender.OnIsOpenChanged(e.OldValue.GetValueOrDefault()!, e.NewValue.GetValueOrDefault()!));

        public partial bool IsOpen
        {
            get => GetValue(IsOpenProperty);
            set => SetValue(IsOpenProperty, value);
        }

        private partial void OnIsOpenChanged(bool oldValue, bool newValue);
    }
}
